emails.subject: Re: Information for Call to LA Mayor Dick Riordan
emails.subject_base: Information for Call to LA Mayor Dick Riordan
emails.body: Re: Information for Call to LA Mayor Dick Riordan This looks fantastic. I apologize profusely. I've got a dozen assigments to finish by COB. But having read this, you obviously needed no help from me. Let me know how the call with Riordan goes. Best, Jeff Karen Denne 05/11/2001 02:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: Information for Call to LA Mayor Dick Riordan
emails.subject_base: Information for Call to LA Mayor Dick Riordan
emails.body: at least this is one thing to cross off your list. For the Silicon Valley meeting, Steve suggested that we use Scott McNealy's contact. I can coordinate let me know if I can take that off your plate, too. thx kd From: Jeff Dasovich on 05/11/2001 02:18 PM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich
